name: Graham Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the powdered milk and water together, then add the lemon juice and mix.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs until light, then add the brown sugar, honey, oil, and vanilla extract.
3. Stir in the salt and baking soda with 3 cups of the flour, and combine with the egg mixture.
4. Continue adding flour until the dough is very stiff.
5. Divide the dough into 4 parts. Lightly grease a cookie sheet with shortening and dust it with flour.
6. Roll one part of the dough out on the cookie sheet until it is about 1/8 inch thick.
7. Use a blunt knife to lightly mark out squares, and use a fork to prick the squares every inch or so.
8. Bake at 375°F for about 15 minutes until lightly browned.
9. Cut into squares immediately and transfer to a cooling rack.
10. Repeat with the remaining 3 parts of the dough.
YIELD: varies depending on size of the cut crackers
